project.name: Clawvato
project.description: Business operating system for solo technical founders. Workstream-based context management with Opus-driven master crawl, admin-voice action briefs, and cloud-accessible state via MCP.

1.name: Build the Agent
1.description: Reactive agent. Slack, memory, Google, Fireflies.

2.name: Build the Brain
2.description: Smart memory plugin. Superseded by v3.

3.name: v3 Operating System
3.description: Workstreams + entities + todos + briefs + scanner. Built, deployed, stabilized. Fundamental limitations discovered.

4.name: v4 Master Crawl
4.description: Ephemeral Opus crawl 2x/day. Code complete, brain-platform deployed with tracked items. Crawl agent deployed but not yet completing successfully. Needs separate Railway service.

infrastructure.local: macOS, brain-platform MCP via local stdio + global ~/.claude.json
infrastructure.database: Railway Postgres — v3 schema + tracked_items table (11 tables)
infrastructure.maxPlan: Claude Max — all LLM via claude --print ($0)

currentSprint.name: v4 Master Crawl — Build & Deploy
goals: Design doc complete with three-layer model, tracked items, agent architecture ✅
Brain-platform: tracked items table + MCP tools ✅
Clawvato: master crawl launcher + prompt + sidecar + config ✅
Deploy and test crawl — NOT WORKING (3 starts, 0 completions)
Set up separate Railway service for crawl sidecar — NEXT
Debug crawl with isolated logs — NEXT
End-to-end test: crawl → briefs → tracked items → canvas → crawl notes
currentSprint.progress: 60% — code complete, deployed, but crawl not completing

lastSession.type: Design refinement + full build + deploy debugging
keyDecisions: Three-layer data model: entity BoB / workstream BoB / brief
Crawl agent must be ephemeral (Memento argument)
Tracked items replace granular todos (semantic keys, status-driven deltas)
Separate Railway service for crawl sidecar (owner decision)
Owner feedback: diagnose first, don't jump to fixes

immediateBacklog.title: Set up separate Railway service for crawl sidecar
Fix urgency check gws binary path

backlog.title: Cross-session context via log_activity MCP tool
